summarization.a: 2θ X-ray diffraction patterns of  Li_{x}MnO_{2} phases at different concentrations.
summarization.b: θ−2θ X-ray diffraction patterns of Li_{x}MnO_{2} phases at different concentrations.

data_extraction.b:
| 2θ Position | Phase / (hkl)       | 300cLi-MnO₂ | 200cLi-MnO₂ | 100cLi-MnO₂ |
|-------------|----------------------|-------------|-------------|-------------|
| ~22         | Lithiated phase     | Yes         | Yes         | Yes         |
| ~36         | Li₁₋ₓMn₂O₄ (400)    | Yes         | Yes         | Yes         |
| ~28         | β-MnO₂ (200)        | No          | No          | Yes         |
| ~32         | *                   | Yes         | Yes         | Yes         |
| ~44         | Lithiated phase     | Yes         | Yes         | Yes         |

a.question: Does the inset in the image explain the geometry of the XRD measurements?
Where has Lithium penetrated?
a.answer: in the samples 200cLi−MnO2 and 300cLi−MnO2, lithium has penetrated throughout the whole film thickness. These samples do not anymore have the β-MnO2 phase in the XRD patterns. The reflections from β-MnO2 disappear even before the structure has reached the stoichiometric LiMn2O4 composition.

b.question: How do the peaks shift with Lithium?
b.answer:
As the concentration of lithium is increased,  two reflections from the lithiated phase shift to lower 2θ
values 
1. From 17.7° to 17.1° 
2. From 35.9° to 34.7°

b.question: How is the XRD data analysed?
b.answer: The graphs are shifted and the backgrounds have been subtracted for ease of analysis
